title: stellaria calycantha var. floribunda
intro: Stellaria calycantha var. floribunda, also known as Starwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family, characterized by its delicate white or pink flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Starwort include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Starwort are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
